notes: Hand-curated ground-truth headlines for the cluster classifier eval suite. Pulled from real titles in services/locales/blog-meta-it.ts plus synthetic edge cases. Labels are honest — ambiguous headlines marked 'generic'. Distribution targets: ~15 per primary cluster (fiscale, salute, mobilita, pratico, lavoro, novita), ~10 generic. Total: ~100 cases.
